emails.subject: Lost items
emails.body: Lost items Kim Do you know someone named Audrey Robertson? She books the 49/C2 room. I need to know if someone turned in a purse and a briefcase this morning (left there). And, if not, who booked that room after Stan's 8 am -9:30 staff meeting was over. (I've tried to call her; got her no. from Cindy Stark, but no answer. I don't know if she is in today or not. I went up to 49/C2 and no purse or briefcase is there. Yes I am losing it!) --Dot

emails.subject: RE: Lost items
emails.body: RE: Lost items Hi Dot. Audrey is our secretary. Her phone number is X35849. I wasn't aware that she books 49C2, but give her a call and see what she says. Happy Thanksgiving. Kim. To: Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: Lost items
emails.body: I have been trying to call her but keep getting voice mail; that's why I wrote you. Since then, I finally got her. Thanks! Hope you and John have a great Thanksgiving too! --Dot To: McCoppin, Dorothy

emails.subject: RE: Lost items
emails.body: Security found purse briefcase around 11 pm last night someone on 49 had taken it to their cubicle; I guess they were waiting for someone to show up asking about it, but then they left or went to a meeting, and weren't there when we were asking all around the floor. Anyway, new lease on life I have everything back! (Makes for a better Thanks- giving, you know!) --Dot To: Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: Lost items
emails.body: Thanks for letting me know. I'm glad you have everything back. How are you doing? K. To: Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: Lost items
emails.body: I was really dragging after working 3 weekends in a row on merger and then loan documents, research, etc. 7 days a week work, and 12 to 14 hour days, is not conducive to good health or good mental attitude, etc. But T-giving, we were off, which was great, so I feel much better today. How are you? Hope you have not been too overloaded and that TW is going great guns! Take care! --Dot To: McCoppin, Dorothy
